# Gatineau

> Geotechnical engineering company in United States, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Active Passive Anchor Design](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/active-passive-anchor-design/)
- [Atterberg Limits](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/atterberg-limits/)
- [Base Isolation Seismic Design](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/base-isolation-seismic-design/)
- [Bearing Capacity Analysis](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/bearing-capacity-analysis/)
- [Contaminated Soil Remediation](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/contaminated-soil-remediation/)
- [Diaphragm Wall Design](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/diaphragm-wall-design/)
- [Direct Shear](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/direct-shear/)
- [Driven Pile Design](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/driven-pile-design/)
- [Dynamic Compaction Design](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/dynamic-compaction-design/)
- [Electrical Resistivity Ves](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/electrical-resistivity-ves/)
- [Existing Pavement Evaluation](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/existing-pavement-evaluation/)
- [Expansive Soil Evaluation](https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/expansive-soil-evaluation/)

## Contact
- Website: https://gatineau.geotechnical-engineering.org/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in United States.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
